author: @SjonnieSchimmelkrans
text:
Man.. I just can't get enough of your videos! Thank you for making all of this content available to everyone. You are a huge inspiration! 
I'm currently working on a project to start a multi-disciplinary cultural center in our city here in Enschede, Netherlands. Part of it is going to be a sustainability center to explore all of these things with a larger public, all of this is because of your videos! Just wanted to let you know, thank you! I think you are really making a change in the world and your approach in making these things accessible to people without in depth knowledge is amazing! <3
Greetz from NL, Joachim
